message:
Update rich_rust dependency from pre-release/git ref to crates.io v0.2.0

The rich_rust library (Rust port of Python's Rich) has been published
to crates.io as v0.2.0. This commit migrates the dependency declaration
from either a pinned git revision, path reference, or older 0.1.x
version to the canonical crates.io release, improving build
reproducibility and eliminating the need for git fetches during
cargo build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ readme = "README.md"
 [workspace.dependencies]
 # Runtime (our own)
 asupersync = "0.2.0"
-rich_rust = "0.1.1"
+rich_rust = "0.2.0"
 
 # Serialization (only these)
 serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
